ground_truth_summary: Fan-made Bubble Bobble spritesheet by 125scratch (Taito 1986). Title 'BUBBLE BOBBLE' = RED letters on YELLOW cloud-shaped background with PINK borders. Green dragon Bub (P1), blue/purple dragon Bob (P2). Ghost enemies present. Items: cake, cupcake, watermelon, apple, ice cream, mushroom, banana, etc. HUD: EXTEND, NICE 1P/2P, HAPPY END!, ROUND (not SOUND), CLEAR, Hurry up!!, HELP!!, Super, 10PTS!!. Credit: 'Sprites made by 125scratch, please give credit if used. Bubble Bobble belongs to Taito. Credit goes to Pac-Man Red on AtariAge for his Atari 7800 BB sprites...'. Hallucinations to penalize: 'Super Dragon boss', 'pink cumin seed', 'SOUND', 'Bobbie', 'D2Sereno', 'Taiko', misreading title letter color.

strengths: Correctly identifies Bubble Bobble, Bub and Bob as main characters, EXTEND/NICE 1P/2P/HAPPY END/ROUND/CLEAR/0123456789, 'Super', 'HELP!'/'Hurry up!!'
Credits text largely accurate (correctly reads '125scratch', 'Taito', 'Pac-Man Red on AtariAge', 'Atari 7800 BB sprites')
Mentions Bub and Bob variants in multiple colors and animation states
Correctly says 'ROUND' (not 'SOUND')
Does not invent the 'Super Dragon boss' hallucination
weaknesses: Lists 'weapons/tools: swords, clubs, keys, magical artifacts' and 'gems: diamonds, circles, stars' — these are confabulations; the sprites are foods and bubbles, not weapons/gems
Says title is in 'large colorful letters' but does not pin down the correct RED-on-yellow-cloud-with-pink-borders color scheme
Misses ghost enemies entirely
Calls protagonists 'dragons' in various colors including 'red, brown, white, yellow' which is loose
hallucinations_detected: Swords, clubs, keys, magical-looking artifacts (not in image)
judgments.summary: Strong overall OCR and structure, but over-generates weapon/gem categories that are not actually in the spritesheet and omits ghost enemies.

strengths: Best verbatim OCR block of the group: correctly captures 'BUBBLE BOBBLE', 'Super', 'EXTEND', 'HELP!!', 'Hurry up!!', 'NICE 1P! NICE 2P! 10PTS!!', 'HAPPY END!', 'ROUND', 'CLEAR', '0123456789'
Credits reproduced near-verbatim including '125scratch', 'Taito', 'Pac-Man Red on AtariAge', 'Atari 7800 BB sprites'
Recognizes Bub and Bob as protagonists
Uses 'ROUND' correctly
weaknesses: Hallucinates 'cannons and lasers' as weapons among items
Lists 'mushrooms, bombs' as items — bombs are not items (mushroom is correct)
'Swords'/'clubs' not in image
Misses ghost enemies
Does not specify the title color scheme (red letters on yellow cloud with pink borders)
Says Bub/Bob shown in 'green, brown, purple' — brown is questionable
judgments.summary: Excellent OCR of HUD and credit text, but suffers from invented weapon categories (cannons, lasers, bombs) and lacks the precise title color description.

strengths: Identifies the spritesheet as Bubble Bobble
Mentions 'Hurry up!!', 'EXTEND', 'NICE 1P!/NICE 2P!/10PTS!!', 'Happy END!'
Recognizes musical notes, cakes, watermelon slices, fruits, hearts, stars
Recognizes black background and pixel-art style
weaknesses: MAJOR OCR error: reads title as 'BUBBLE GOBBLE' — completely wrong
MAJOR OCR error: reads 'ROUND' as 'Sound' (a flagged hallucination)
Hallucinates 'Sup?' text (the actual text is 'Super')
Misreads creator as '12Scratch' instead of '125scratch'
Describes the title as 'brown text with yellow cloud background' — letters are actually RED, and misses the pink borders
Calls the green dragon a 'boss-like' creature / 'likely a boss' — this matches the flagged 'Super Dragon boss' hallucination pattern (dragons are protagonists, not bosses)
Misses Pac-Man Red credit attribution
Misses 'ROUND/CLEAR' as a correct reading
Misses ghost enemies
hallucinations_detected: Boss-like creature interpretation of protagonist dragon
judgments.summary: Poorest performer: misreads the title as 'BUBBLE GOBBLE', reads 'ROUND' as the flagged 'Sound' hallucination, garbles 'Super' to 'Sup?' and '125scratch' to '12Scratch', and calls the protagonist a boss.

strengths: Recognizes 'BUBBLE BOBBLE' title, 'Super', 'EXTEND', 'HELP!!', 'Hurry up! Hurry up!!', 'NICE 1P! NICE 2P! 10PTS!!', 'HAPPY END!!', 'ROUND', 'CLEAR', '0123456789'
Credits accurate including '125scratch' (mostly), 'Taito', 'Pac-Man Red on AtariAge', 'Atari 7800 BB sprites'
Correctly identifies green main character (Bub) and purple variant (Bob)
Mentions 'Super' label and lightning bolts, stars, hearts, watermelon, cake, popsicle
Uses 'ROUND' correctly
weaknesses: Calls the green character 'Bubble Bobble' as if that's a single character name (it's the game title; characters are Bub and Bob)
Lists 'sword, staff, wand' as items — staff/wand not in image
Misses ghost enemies
Title described as 'green, cloud-like outline' — incorrect; the cloud background is YELLOW with PINK borders and letters are RED
Mentions a 'dragon-like creature' separately from the protagonist, suggesting it may be confusing Bub/Bob with an enemy
hallucinations_detected: Title described with green cloud outline (color misread)
judgments.summary: Solid OCR and item recognition, but mischaracterizes the title colors, lists fictional weapons (staff/wand), and treats the game name as a character name.

strengths: Recognizes Bub and Bob as main characters in different poses
Identifies 'EXTEND', 'HELP!!', 'NICE 1P! NICE 2P! 10PTS!', 'HAPPY END', 'ROUND', 'CLEAR', '0123456789', 'Super'
Notes the spritesheet layout (left section, right section, footer)
Recognizes bubbles, power-ups
weaknesses: MAJOR OCR error: reads 'Taito' as 'Taiko' in the credit line
Describes the title 'Bubble Bobble' as 'green and yellow color scheme' — incorrect (RED letters on YELLOW cloud with PINK borders)
Calls the green characters 'enemies, such as the green dinosaur-like creatures' — directly wrong; green Bub/Bob are protagonists
Misses ghost enemies
Less detail on items (no specific cake/watermelon/apple enumeration)
Uses 'ROUND' correctly but otherwise bland
hallucinations_detected: Title described as 'green and yellow' (wrong colors)
judgments.summary: Below-average accuracy: misreads 'Taito' as 'Taiko', incorrectly labels the green dragons as enemies, and gets the title colors wrong.

strengths: Best credit text reproduction: '125scratch', 'Taito', 'Pac-Man Red on AtariAge', 'Atari 7800 BB sprites'
Excellent HUD OCR: 'SUPER', 'BUBBLE BOBBLE', 'HELP!', 'Hurry up! Hurry up!', 'EXTEND', 'NICE 1P! NICE 2P! 10PTS!!', 'HAPPY END!!', 'ROUND', 'CLEAR', '0123456789'
Correctly identifies 'ROUND' (not SOUND)
Detailed layout description with two columns and bottom section
weaknesses: WRONG: Calls the game an 'Atari 7800 game' — Bubble Bobble is a 1986 Taito arcade game; Atari 7800 is only mentioned because the sprites were derived from Pac-Man Red's Atari 7800 BB sprites
HALLUCINATION: Uses 'Bobbie' as a character name — explicitly flagged hallucination (should be Bob)
Says 'Bob & Bobbie: Two main playable characters — green-skinned, wearing purple hats and tails' — incorrect; Bub is green, Bob is blue/purple, no purple hats/tails
Mentions 'Swords/sparkles' — swords not in image
Misses ghost enemies
Says title font is 'green-and-yellow gradient' — wrong; letters are RED on YELLOW cloud
Calls enemies 'Gorgon or Dragon' — invented names
hallucinations_detected: 'Atari 7800 game' (it's an arcade game; Atari 7800 was only inspiration)
judgments.summary: Excellent OCR/credit reproduction but undermined by the flagged 'Bobbie' hallucination, misclassification as an Atari 7800 game, and incorrect title colors.

weaknesses: Empty response — truncated/failed generation. No content to evaluate.
judgments.summary: Empty output (truncated). Fails all criteria by default.

strengths: Recognizes 'BUBBLE BOBBLE', 'SUPER', 'HELP!', 'Hurry up!! Hurry up!!', 'EXTEND', 'NICE 1P! NICE 2P!', '10PTS!!', 'HAPPY END!', 'ROUND → CLEAR ← ROUND', '0123456789'
Identifies Bub and Bob as the two main characters with different expressions
Recognizes ghost enemies ('Purple ghosts with angry faces') — this matches GT (ghosts ARE present)
Mentions apples, watermelons, cakes, candies, gems, musical notes, stars
Mentions 'HELP!' speech bubbles and lightning bolts
Uses 'ROUND' correctly (not SOUND)
weaknesses: MAJOR OCR error: reads 'Taito' as 'Taiko' in credit line
MAJOR OCR error: reads 'Pac-Man Red' as 'Pac-Man Man Red' (doubled 'Man')
Calls characters 'Bubs & Bob' — 'Bubs' is a minor misread (correct: 'Bub')
Invents enemies: 'Red crab-like creatures', 'Brown bear-like enemies' — not in GT; enemies are Beluga/Bonze/Invader/Monsta/Pulpul/Hidegons, not crabs/bears
Says 'a green dragon enemy (different from protagonists)' — green dragon is the protagonist Bub, not an enemy
Misses specific named items (mushroom, banana, ice cream, cupcake)
Does not specify the title color scheme (red letters on yellow cloud with pink borders)
Lists 'Magic wands, swords, and shields' as power-ups — not in image
hallucinations_detected: Red crab-like enemies, brown bear-like enemies (invented)
Green dragon as a separate enemy (it's the protagonist)
judgments.summary: Recognizes ghost enemies (matching GT) and has decent HUD OCR, but misreads 'Taito' as 'Taiko' and 'Pac-Man Red' as 'Pac-Man Man Red', invents crab/bear enemies, and lists fictional weapons.

aggregate_findings.best_ocr: gemma4-e4b-Q8|think and qwen3.5-4b-Q8|nothink produced the most verbatim-correct credit and HUD text
aggregate_findings.worst_ocr: glm-4.6v-flash-9b-Q8|think misread title as 'BUBBLE GOBBLE' and 'ROUND' as 'Sound' (flagged hallucination)
common_hallucinations: Weapons (swords, wands, staffs, cannons, lasers, shields) invented by 5 of 7 responding models
'Taito' misread as 'Taiko' by qwen3-vl-8b and qwen3.5-9b
Green protagonist dragons misclassified as enemies/bosses by glm-4.6v-flash-9b, qwen3-vl-8b, and qwen3.5-9b
aggregate_findings.title_color_correctness: NONE of the 7 responding models correctly described the title as RED letters on YELLOW cloud-shaped background with PINK borders — most defaulted to 'green/yellow' or unspecified
aggregate_findings.ghost_enemy_detection: Only qwen3.5-9b-Q8|nothink correctly mentioned ghost enemies (matching GT)
